case_title: ANTONIO ORILLE JR. VS. BRUCE MORMUNE

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ORILLE JR., ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT MORMUNE, BRUCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED=RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORILLE JR., ANTONIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MORMUNE, BRUCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
